title: Groups module live, GDS running, WalletConnect functional
content_html:
A big platform update is rolling out.

What is live now:

  • The first VCs are onboarded on Cryptool
  • Groups module is live, ready for investment groups and syndicates
  • GDS (the project and vesting database) is up and running
  • Profile and wallet page are fully functional, with WalletConnect support including Trust Wallet

Coming next: the Raise module with full revenue and paid subscription support, plus more launchpads joining Cryptool.

Sign up at cryptool.io to try it now.
author: Cryptool
